calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2025 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions On The Listing Sale And Sale Of Trust Property And For Removal Of Successor Co-Trustee Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marian Esver, petitioner, in pro per.
Stella Esver, respondent, in pro per.

The matter was called for hearing on (1) petition for instructions regarding the listing and sale of trust property and for removal of successor co-trustee; and (2) order to show cause re: suspension of co-trustee Stella Esver.

The Court noted that it had previously issued an order to show cause regarding suspension of Stella Esver and had provided her an opportunity to submit written opposition. Stella Esver was heard.

After discussion and hearing oral argument, the Court found that the co-trustees were unable to work together. The Court took the matter under submission with intent to remove Stella Esver as successor co-trustee and confirm Marian Esver as sole trustee, and to deny the balance of the petition without prejudice.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Instructions On The Listing Sale And Sale Of Trust Property And For Removal Of Successor Co-Trustee Of Trust
Off Calendar Nov-17-2025 Continued To Dec-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marian Esver, petitioner and successor co-trustee in pro per.
Stella Esver, respondent and successor co-trustee in pro per.

The matter was called for hearing on Marian Esver's Petition for Instructions on the Listing and Sale of Trust Property and for Removal of Successor Co-Trustee of Trust.

Stella Esver requested a continuance to January to allow time to obtain counsel. She stated that she has been unable to retain an attorney after multiple attempts, that she has lived at the property since childhood, has maintained it, and wishes to buy out the other beneficiaries.

Marian Esver objected to any delays and stated she seeks to honor their parents' intent as stated in the 2018 First Amendment to the trust, which calls for the sale of the property and division of the net estate (one-third to a Special Needs Trust for Rosario Esver; one-third to a Special Needs Trust for Stella Esver; and one-third to herself). She stated no Special Needs Trusts currently exist, but she intends to establish them consistent with the amendment.

Stella Esver alleged that Marian has acted against family interests. She also described past refinances and efforts to prevent foreclosure. Marian reported she personally paid $31,239.15 to cure a foreclosure default covering 18 months of missed mortgage payments, using her own funds.

Following discussion, the Court continued the petition and stated it would issue an Order to Show Cause re: Suspension of Co-Trustee Stella Esver on the basis of conflict of interest and non-cooperation, noting that she resides in the trust property. Hearing on the Order to Show Cause and continued petition was set for December 29, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Court ordered Marian Esver serve notice of the continued hearing and petition on beneficiary Alan Esver. Stella Esver may file a written response addressing why she should not be suspended as co-trustee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
